1.text: A ringing blow to the head leaves the target dazed. He suffers a –10 penalty to all tests for 1 round.

2.text: The impact sends the target reeling. He is Stunned for 1 round and must make a Challenging (+0) Toughness test or be knocked Prone.

3.text: A solid blow to the head ruptures the target's ear drum. He is Deafened for [[1d5]] hours (or until he receives medical attention) and is Stunned for 1 round.

4.text: The force of the attack breaks the target's nose in a spray of blood and cartilage. He suffers 2 levels of Fatigue, is Stunned for [[1d5]] rounds, and must make a Challenging (+0) Toughness test or suffer Blood Loss.

5.text: The crushing blow fractures the target's skull, driving splinters of bone into the brain. He is Stunned for [[1d5]] rounds and suffers [[1d10]] Intelligence damage. Permanently reduce his Intelligence characteristic by 1.

6.text: The massive blow caves in the side of the target's head, shattering bone and pulping the ear. He is Stunned for [[1d10]] rounds and permanently Deafened in one ear. Permanently reduce his Intelligence and Perception characteristics by [[1d5]] each.

7.text: The impact cracks the target's skull wide open, leaving a deep depression in the bone. He suffers [[1d10]] levels of Fatigue, is Stunned for [[1d10]] rounds, and suffers Blood Loss. Permanently reduce his Weapon Skill, Ballistic Skill, Intelligence, and Perception characteristics by [[1d10]] each.

8.text: The target's skull is shattered by the tremendous blow, driving fragments of bone deep into the brain. He is slain instantly.

9.text: The target's head is caved in by the force of the blow, crushing the skull and destroying the brain. He is slain instantly, grey matter and shards of bone spraying from the ruined head.

10.text: The target's head is pulverised by the blow, exploding in a shower of bone, blood, and brain matter. He is slain instantly. Each character within [[1d5]] metres must make a Challenging (+0) Agility test or suffer a –10 penalty to all tests for 1 round as they are splattered with gore.
